description_long: This bungalow features a long, narrow green lawn extending from a compact, single-story residential structure. The building itself is small and rectangular, with a dark roof and light-colored walls, positioned at one end of the property. The roof appears to be flat or nearly flat, and the house is set back from the main expanse of the lawn. There are minimal visible architectural details, with no prominent porch or decorative elements. The windows and doors are not clearly visible from these views, suggesting a simple, modern design. The overall impression is of a modest, contemporary bungalow with a large, triangular yard.
description: A small, modern bungalow with a flat roof sits at the edge of a long, triangular green lawn. The structure is compact and minimalistic, with a dark roof and light walls.
description_view_0: From this view, the bungalow is seen at the far end of a wide, green triangular lawn, with the building's narrow side facing forward.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the green lawn and shows the bungalow as a small structure at one end, emphasizing the building's compactness.
description_view_2: Here, the bungalow is at the apex of the triangular lawn, with the building's rear or side visible and minimal architectural features apparent.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1 but from the opposite side, again showing the bungalow at the end of the long, green expanse.
